creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
X => Xorg, from xorg-server: 'X -configure' does not delete /tmp/.X11-unix/X0 when it's done.  The result is that one can't start X again (such as 'X -config xorg.conf.new') until the pipe is deleted.

I think this is relatively new.  I don't recall seeing this problem before.
